name: Hershey's Best Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hershey's® cocoa or Hershey's European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt the butter for 2-2 1/2 minutes at HIGH (100%).
4. Stir in sugar and vanilla; add eggs one at a time, beating until well blended.
5. Add flour, baking powder, and salt; beat well.
6. Stir in nuts if desired.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
9. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
Note: About 36 brownies will be made.
